records.ety: [F. avaritia, fr. avarus avaricious, prob. fr. avēre to covet, fr. a root av to satiate one's self: cf. Gr. 'a`menai, 'a^sai, to satiate, Skr. av to satiate one's self, rejoice, protect.]

defs: An excessive or inordinate desire of gain; greediness for wealth; covetousness; cupidity.
quotes: To desire money for its own sake, and in order to hoard it up, is avarice.

defs: An inordinate desire for some supposed good.
quotes: All are taught an avarice of praise.
